name: ppt-image2-editable-rebuild
description: Slash command and workflow skill for rebuilding image2 reference slides as editable PowerPoint decks.

interface.shortDescription: Rebuild image2 reference slides as editable PowerPoint decks.
interface.longDescription: Provides the /ppt-image2-editable-rebuild command and bundled workflow skill for creating editable PPT decks from image2 or imagegen reference PNGs.
defaultPrompt: Use $ppt-image2-editable-rebuild for the editable PPT workflow
